scope: L-size fresh migration of internal/connectors/trello: boards (full parity) plus lists/checklists (board_ids-scoped fan_out; auto-discovery narrowed, see docs.md). cards/actions are blocked — see blockers.

excluded.reason: authenticated-member identity probe used only by Check(), not a syncable object stream

legacy's board_ids-configured per-id GET path for the boards stream itself is not modeled; boards always lists every accessible board (see docs.md Known limits) — a documented, non-security-relevant deviation, not a missing endpoint in practice (the same board data is still reachable via /members/me/boards)

ENGINE_GAP: cards requires board auto-discovery (fan_out.ids_from.request) AND id-cursor pagination (before param, last_record_field) on the SAME stream; the engine reuses one PaginationSpec for both the id-listing request and the per-board sub-fetch, so the id-listing call would either hard 401 (stream.Query's token param is not applied to fan_out.ids_from.request) or infinite-loop under lastRecordCursor (no short-page stop, no loop guard, and /members/me/boards ignores the before param entirely). See docs.md Known limits and this migration's reported blockers[].

ENGINE_GAP: identical fan_out + cursor-pagination conflict as /boards/{id}/cards above (actions also uses id-cursor before pagination). See docs.md Known limits and this migration's reported blockers[].
